camera.font_corner_camera.name: Font Corner Camera
camera.font_corner_camera.location: Office front parking - hedge, sign pole, parking lot
camera.font_corner_camera.notes: White Chevy Equinox usually parked on right. Dark SUV appears during business hours upper-left.

camera.security_camera_5.name: Security Camera 5
camera.security_camera_5.location: Shop side lot - metal building, gravel parking, loading area
camera.security_camera_5.notes: Vehicles occasionally park here during work hours. Gold/tan truck observed Day 1.

camera.muse_office.name: Muse Office
camera.muse_office.location: Indoor office - desks, chairs, couch, printer
camera.muse_office.notes: People work here ~10am-5pm. Tuya camera has built-in motion detection green boxes. Most valuable camera for real activity.

camera.barn.name: Barn
camera.barn.notes: Very noisy - 213 events in old data with minimal real changes. Lights on/off is the main real event. High threshold needed.

camera.back_camera.name: Back Camera
camera.back_camera.location: Back of office building - may need re-aiming
camera.back_camera.notes: Was aimed at wall in Feb, may have been fixed. High threshold - only alert on big changes. Re-enable to check.

camera.front_camera.name: Front Camera
camera.front_camera.notes: Was unavailable in Feb. Possibly Wyze. Will auto-detect if it comes online.

camera.front_motion_camera.name: Front Motion Camera
camera.front_motion_camera.location: Front yard motion camera - currently offline
camera.front_motion_camera.notes: Was unavailable in Feb. Possibly Wyze. Will auto-detect if it comes online.

camera.front_doorbell.name: Front Doorbell
camera.front_doorbell.location: Front door doorbell camera - currently offline
camera.front_doorbell.notes: Wyze doorbell. Was unavailable in Feb. Will auto-detect if it comes online.
